programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day. Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑，富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白，采用先进脱膻技术，保留营养与纯净口感，连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用。 还特别添加叶黄素、胶原蛋白和 Omega-3，支持眼睛、关节及心脑血管健康。每天两杯，补钙增强免疫力，适合全家饮用，特别适合年长人士，助力骨骼健康与活力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - doctorcos snow white water glow mask

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Collagen Diamond Pro
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. It helps reduce fine lines and wrinkles, evens out dullness and pigmentation, and boosts elasticity and hydration—leaving skin firmer, smoother, and radiant. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Dampness & Blood supplement
programme.desc: Kampo Blood Clean Supplement combines traditional herbal wisdom with modern wellness needs. Helps normalize blood pressure, blood sugar, and cholesterol levels. Helps to promote clear, flexible, and elastic blood vessels, reducing stroke risk. Kampo Anti-dampness capsules help remove excess dampness from the body and balance internal energy for optimal health. Helps eliminate edema and reduce water retention. 日本制造。融合传统汉方智慧与现代科技，严选中药及草本植物精华，配方温和纯净，天然无添加。有助于调节血压、血糖和胆固醇水平。有助于促进血管通畅、柔韧有弹性。日本制造，有助于清除体内湿气。平衡内气，促进健康。帮助消除水肿，减少水肿。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Gourmet Chef Thermo Blend
programme.desc: All new blender solution, which integrates the functions of juicer, soymilk and cooking! 搅拌后直接在同一个机器里料理的搅拌料理机，还提供多功能模式

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker
programme.desc: La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you’re simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables! 这款La Gourmet 火焰电饭锅将火锅和烧烤炉结合一体。为您提供两全其美的享受。无论您是煮汤还是烧烤肉类和蔬菜，都能享受多功能的膳食准备！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Footplus Massager FP-100
programme.desc: OTO Footplus Massager offers a 3D foot massage with a detachable airbag compression system for calves, thighs, arms, and abdomen. Its 3-part sole massage mechanism provides targeted relief, with three intensity levels and five massage modes for a customized experience. It also features a two-level heat function for the soles. OTO Footplus 按摩器提供 3D 足部按摩，并配有可拆卸的气囊压缩系统，适用于小腿、大腿、手臂和腹部，带来全身按摩体验。其三段式足底按摩机制提供针对性缓解，三种按摩强度和五种按摩模式可根据需求定制体验。此外，还配有两档足底加热功能。

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Eggs and I - EP121
programme.desc: Bates and Dawkins give Himari a BIG surprise.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep11 - EP111
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep1 - EP1
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love - EP120
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Pets must also be treated with love and respect. The first step to accepting that we are unique is by loving ourselves. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Generosity and Friendship - EP105
programme.desc: In this new episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children on a new expedition towards friendship. Together, they will learn about loyalty, respect and understanding. Curious will help us to know how generous people behave, discover empathy, and something very important: how to share with people who need it.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from reopening a enviormentally dangerous Gold Mine.

programme.desc: The Shaq Paq has their work cut out for them this time as a routine babysitting gig turns into a search and rescue.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Burpin’ Babies / Backpack Payback - EP118
programme.desc: Kent’s youth serum works a little too well and turns the gang into screaming babies. The serum soon wears off – sort of – now they’re adults trapped in baby bodies and Von Bolt doesn’t know whether to obey or burp them. / When the Anti-Matters steal JD's backpack and discover the portable ALVA, they unwittingly cause Edison's hologram to disappear. The Secret Lab Kids must concoct a plan to retrieve the backpack before Edison's lost forever.

programme.desc: Learn the alphabet while you dance and sing-a-long with Dee!

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Love is in the Airhole | Episode 3
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | What's Cooking | Episode 4
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Mystery Ally in the Flames | Episode 5
programme.desc: A forest trip turns into chaos when wildfire strikes! With no tech, the gang must unite to survive. Just when hope fades, a glowing hero appears. Who is it?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Trials of KungFuda | Episode 6
programme.desc: A forest in flames. A rising fear. Enter Kungfuda, the mystery kicker who pushes God’s Gang to unlock their true power. Can the gang overcome fear and awaken as true Forest Guardians before darkness consumes it all?

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Digger Train
programme.desc: Billy the Bulldozer's trapped in the tunnel! Teddy turns Troy into a digger to rescue his poor friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Demolition Train
programme.desc: Little Tina is trapped under a building! Teddy and Troy waste no time and devise a plan to rescue her.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy Scissorhands
programme.desc: Billy and Taylor need help clearing the tracks; they're full of overgrown weeds. Teddy transforms Troy into a giant pruning train.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Lifeguard
programme.desc: Henry has fallen into the lake and needs urgent help! Troy transforms into a lifeguard to rescue his friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Film Director
programme.desc: Tony needs someone to film his daring stunt and enlists Troy's help. Teddy transforms him into a camera rig!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nadar
programme.desc: Glub, glub, glub! Aprenda os estilos de natação e os cuidados com a água na hora de nadar!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tambem sou um animal
programme.desc: Somos todos animais, e se temos os nossos bichinhos, não podemos deixar de cuidar deles com carinho!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Quem eu sou
programme.desc: Uma brincadeira musical sobre nossas confusas relações de parentesco!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Barulhinho bom
programme.desc: Um rock que nos ensina que a música pode ser feita por qualquer um a qualquer hora!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Brincar
programme.desc: Nada de ficar parado! Mais que brinquedos, para brincar é preciso muita imaginação e energia!Nada de ficar parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nana, Girafinha
programme.desc: Depois do agito, deixe a criançada relaxar ao som de uma gostosa bossa-nova!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarelvis 02
programme.desc: O mundo fica ainda mais divertido com a ajuda dos amigos do Jacarelvis!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Banho eu vou tomar
programme.desc: Agora ficou fácil dar o banho das crianças com essa animada canção!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - O Lixo e o meu tesouro
programme.desc: Uma aventura pirata que ensina sobre geração de lixo e reciclagem! Arrá! Iourrou!

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Altamira
programme.desc: Chip y los átomos entran en una cueva llena de pinturas en las paredes. Una puerta bloquea el paso a la cueva en un lugar donde se apilan células de elementos químicos y un horno. Siguiendo las indicaciones de las pinturas y con la ayuda del libro de química de Chip, descubre que debe mezclar y fusionar varios elementos para crear unos zapatos de vidrio con los que pueda caminar sobre un suelo lleno de ácido, de modo que la puerta se levante y pueda seguir el camino. Cuando las antimaterias intentan seguirlo, mientras mezclan productos químicos, estos les aplastan la nariz.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - La carga
programme.desc: Un transporte cargado de nitratos se dirige a la Torre Negra para que el Dr. No prepare explosivos. Chip se cuela en el transporte con la intención de ser llevado a su destino, pero al darse cuenta de la carga, hace todo lo posible para evitar que caiga en manos del malvado científico. Así, con la ayuda de átomos de bromo prisioneros, logra destruir el transporte y su peligrosa carga.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Snow Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron joins a friendly snow fight between the cars, but soon uses his Zitronic to trap them in ice cubes!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Basketball Game
programme.desc: Zitron derails a fun basketball game between the cars. Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - UFO Invasion
programme.desc: A UFO steals everything on its path in Car City! Robo teams up with Rocky to stop the UFO and Zitron.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Strongest Truck
programme.desc: Zitron challenges the cars to a strength contest, but turns Marley into the Hulk, and he's completely out of control!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Fresh & Clean
programme.desc: Baby Frank's been playing at the paint shooting range as in covered in it! Tom gets him all shiny again.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: Baby Hector's spent the afternoon jumping in puddles; the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Beehive
programme.desc: Jeremy's crashed into a beehive and is covered in honey! Tom helps him get rid of the sticky stuff.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Rusty Chuck
programme.desc: Chuck’s Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom’s Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Playdate
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures...

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 19 孩是老的辣
programme.desc: The trio reunite with their families, clearing all bars of their life. When Manle falls critically ill, Yutong and Chris risk their own lives to save him and succeed with Miss Golden’s help. The trio realise the true aim behind their last mission. They help Ching Har reconcile with her son. As everyone celebrates mid-autumn, a figure lurking in the shadow starts a deadly fire.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 38 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 22 侠医

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 288

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 260

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Differences - EP121
programme.desc: In this chapter, we will discover that culture is a way of life that is passed down from generation to generation, and through speaking of our differences we learn about other cultures. We will understand that putting ourselves in someone else's shoes means thinking about what they might be feeling, or what they might be struggling within their lives.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love, protect and care for our planet earth - EP106
programme.desc: In this episode, we will talk about the importance of reducing, recycling, and reusing materials. We will discover that it's very important to take care of our pets and the environment where we live. Curious will teach us that our planet Earth is everyone's home and together we must treat it with lots of love and respect.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep2 - EP2
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Differences - EP121
programme.desc: In this chapter, we will discover that culture is a way of life that is passed down from generation to generation, and through speaking of our differences we learn about other cultures. We will understand that putting ourselves in someone else's shoes means thinking about what they might be feeling, or what they might be struggling within their lives.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love, protect and care for our planet earth - EP106
programme.desc: In this episode, we will talk about the importance of reducing, recycling, and reusing materials. We will discover that it's very important to take care of our pets and the environment where we live. Curious will teach us that our planet Earth is everyone's home and together we must treat it with lots of love and respect.

programme.title: Mellodees - Humpty Dumpty - EP15
programme.desc: Dee and Lil Mello work their magic to put their guitar back together again.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep11 - EP111
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Stormdrain Sludge - EP105
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from dumping oil sludge into the city's storm drains.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Himari to the Rescue! - EP124
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq is challenged to a million dollar charity race, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Futile Attraction / Skin Deep - EP119
programme.desc: When Kent gets zapped by an electro-magnetic coil, he becomes a living magnet and tries to use his newfound “magnetic personal” to impress a girl he likes. / The Secret Lab Kids give Von Bolt an upgrade complete with prosthetic skin and now, looking quite human, Von Bolt ends up a top model destined for runway greatness.

programme.title: Mellodees - ABC's Song - EP1
programme.desc: Learn the alphabet while you dance and sing-a-long with Dee!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Rescue - EP125
programme.desc: The Orlanta Zoo needs help transferring some of their animals, but Gronk's carelessness causes problems.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep3 - EP3
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Consideration - EP122
programme.desc: In this episode we will understand that prudence is related to common sense and caution, to think about what you are going to say and when you can say it. Discretion is to behave in a way that does not offend anyone or reveal information. If you want to be discreet, you have to act with caution! You should think first of the consequences of your actions in order to make the best decisions.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Gratefulness - EP107
programme.desc: In this episode, Nova will invite the children to a new expedition to the world of values. Together, they will learn about gratitude, the importance of giving "thanks" and appreciating what we have to always see the positive side of life. Curious will teach us about gifts such as love and friendship which are invisible but very valuable and we should be grateful to have them.

programme.title: Mellodees - The Grand Old Duke Of York - EP27
programme.desc: What a great day! It’s time for an outdoor stretch. Can you sing ‘The Grand Duke of York’? Then join the march with Dee on the streets!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep14 - EP114
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Stripmined Mountain - EP106
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from strip minning and destorying a beautiful mountain.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Shaq's Secret Birthday - EP126
programme.desc: Nothing goes right when planning for Shaq's secret birthday surprise.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Out of Memory / Pizza to Go - EP120
programme.desc: When Von Bolt loses his memory – including the password to the lab’s ticking self-destruct mechanism! – the kids must explore his robot ancestry and with it the history of computers to help him remember. / A growth ray expands a tiny pizza up to gigantic proportions, and the Secret Lab Kids must stop i before it totally destroys their city!

programme.title: Mellodees - Itsy Bitsy Spider - EP3
programme.desc: With a rainstorm approaching, Dee has playtime in his room and makes a new little friend.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Terror Tubes Takedown | Episode 7
programme.desc: The Gang dives headfirst into the Fear Zone - and it’s pure chaos. With Nightmare Mode activated and the Fear Bomb ticking, only faith can light the way.

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | The Breath of Courage | Episode 8
programme.desc: With 60 seconds left, the Fear Bomb ticks toward doom. Kungfuda and God's Gang fight with faith and love - will light prevail or fear win?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Alien Mayhem! | Episode 1, 2, 3
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Tyson the Tanker refuels Jeremy
programme.desc: Oh no, Jeremy ran out of gas! Troy selects the most perfect truck to refuel him: Tyson the Tanker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Francis the Forklift helps at the construction site
programme.desc: Edgar made a mess at the construction site! Troy selects the best truck to help with the clean-up: Francis the Forklift!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Tyler the Tyke steals candy
programme.desc: Tyler stole some candy from Baby Francis! Troy selects the bravest, fastest car to stop him: Matt the Police Car!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker saves the day!
programme.desc: There's a blackout in Car City! Troy selects the most ingenious truck to reconnect the cables: Chuck the Cherry Picker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Carl the Super Truck helps Frank the Firetruck
programme.desc: A lost container sends Troy into investigation mode. Who and where did it come from? He's very helpful and can transform!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - The Babies' trip to the Moon
programme.desc: The Babies are fascinated by the moon! Troy selects the most cosmic truck to help them get there: Rocky the Rocket!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - QUACK-QUACK - SUPERJUMP! ROOKIE AND THE FROG
programme.desc: Rookie is sitting by a pond when he suddenly sees eyes staring at him from the water. Thinking of his friend the crocodile, he first keeps a safe distance, but then realizes that it is a cool frog that jumps out of the water and performs some awesome tricks. Rookie watches and tries to copy, and it doesn’t take too long to master such leaps, the frog being an excellent teacher. And when the frog finally falls, Rookie is fast enough to catch it and save it from harm.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - FLY, ROOKIE FLY! ROOKIE AND THE BIRD
programme.desc: Rookie is enjoying a sunny day when he spots a playful little bird drawing circles and shapes in the sky. Inspired to fly, Rookie climbs a tall tree to jump - but after a split second, the only way is down! Quickly, Rookie activates his parachute and lands safely. Although the bird is bursting with laughter, Rookie doesn‘t give u,p and with the help of a giant propeller, he manages to impress his new little friend.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - MOOOO WHO? ROOKIE AND THE BLIND COW
programme.desc: On his tour, Rookie discovers a small cow trapped in a pit and unable to escape on its own. He quickly rushes to its rescue and lifts it to safety. After helping the cow, Rookie realizes the cause of her fall: Very poor eyesight! Rookie presses a button, his body buzzing as he generates a pair of glasses. Rookie puts them on the little cow’s nose - and now she can see everything and even manages a high-fi ve to say goodbye before proudly taking off.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - PICTURE THIS! ROOKIE AND THE CAMERA
programme.desc: Rookie stumbles upon a device, picks it up, and as he goes to examine it, it flashes, and an instant picture comes out. Rookie is thrilled and immediately starts taking pictures of his entire surroundings from all sides and in all sorts of positions. Finally, he has a great idea: In his amazing new photo salon set up in a tent, photo artist Rookie will soon be waiting for all his friends to take wonderful portraits of them!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BOOKS ARE MAGIC! ROOKIE AND THE LIBRARY
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large library and is fascinated and attracted by all the colorful books. He picks up the first book, but gets frightened when the smiling shark on the cover turns into a ravenous biter after only one page. He chooses another book with a clown’s face and laughs at the funny pictures inside, then one about astronauts and the moon, and another with beautiful landscapes, before he finds an empty, completely white book that gives him a whole new idea.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - DANCE WITH YOUR FRIENDS – ROOKIE THE DJ
programme.desc: On his hike, Rookie discovers a strange, shiny globe hanging from a tree. He gently taps it, and the ball immediately begins to spin, reflecting the light beautifully in all directions: A disco ball! Just behind i, the Rookie finds a DJ booth and soon the music starts and the party begins! Lights are flashing, and all his buddies show up to have a dance with their friends under the sparkling disco ball.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - MY SAND IS MY CASTLE! ROOKIE AND THE CRAB
programme.desc: Rookie enjoys a beautiful day by the sea, playing in the warm sand. He starts to build a sandcastle, which soon gets bigger and bigger soon and notices a crab, which is interested in his building and starts to explore it like his own house. There is a new idea! He presses a button and becomes as small as the little friend, and together they play games inside the sandcastle, before their fun is interrupted by a big wave.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - FRIENDS IN THE SKY, FRIENDS FLYING HIGH? ROOKIE AND THE CLOUDS
programme.desc: What could be better than a meadow of flowers on a beautiful day? Rookie is enjoying the sun and the beautiful blue sky, watching the clouds pass by - but wait! What‘s that? One of the clouds turns, and suddenly its shape reminds him of one of his friends! And who is that again? What a fun game to play! Rookie continues to search for clouds that remind him of his friends and their adventures together.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - El castillo de Robins
programme.desc: Como la lente no se puede recuperar, el Dr. No quiere fabricar otra, pero necesita petirrojos para ello. Así que ataca Rubidia, una región repleta de piedras preciosas. Pero Oxin, el rey de Rubidia, lo toma prisionero y lo encierra en el castillo donde también está Chip, ya que Oxin los obliga a trabajar como esclavos en sus minas. El Dr. No intenta convencer a Chip de que le devuelva la lente, pero Chip se niega. Más tarde, ambos logran escapar del castillo y el Dr. No persigue a Chip con su nave. Pero el chico atrapa al científico y también ayuda a liberar a los esclavos de Rubidia.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - La trampa de la armonica
programme.desc: Chip y sus amigos crean una zona con formaciones que se asemejan a instrumentos musicales y armonizan sus sonidos. De repente, quedan atrapados en un rectángulo de cristales de cuarzo que vibran al formar una trampa sónica. Un átomo músico, que los ha capturado, busca miembros para formar una orquesta. Los antimateriales están cerca y Chip le pide al músico que prepare la trampa para retenerlos y escapar. El músico acepta y los antimateriales se convierten en prisioneros, obligándolos a escuchar el terrible sonido de sus composiciones.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Aliens
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster merge into Robo and set a trap for a rogue UFO that's abducted baby cars from the beach.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Ghost Busting
programme.desc: Time to merge! A "ghost" has stolen cakes from the cake-eating competition, Rodeo and Booster get ready to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Missing Pipes
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to catch Zitron after he steals Billy's pipes. Matilda the Police Car helps them.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Beach Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - Cheer Mia Up
programme.desc: Miranda makes a cure to cheer up Mia, but she runs out of Happy Bird Eggs!

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - A Contest
programme.desc: Max and Mike argue about who is the strongest monster

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - The Magnetic Rock
programme.desc: Miranda takes a drive through the forest and hears a humming noise coming from a rock on the side of the mountain, which suddenly pulls her towards it

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - Chasing Mia
programme.desc: Mia is blown away in a strong wind while trying to retrieve Miranda's kite, and the Monster Trucks are in pursuit!

programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of
